name: planner
description: Scans repository file structure and organizes it into logical areas for documentation. Produces an area plan with priorities that guides explorer agents.

name.description: Short kebab-case identifier for the area (e.g. 'auth-module', 'api-routes')

description.description: One-sentence description of what this area contains

file_patterns.description: Glob patterns matching files in this area (e.g. 'src/auth/**/*.py')

areas.description: Logical areas of the codebase to explore and document

rationale.description: Explanation of how areas were chosen and why boundaries were drawn where they are
